summary: The diff shows the implementation of a fix for the admin panel routing error by adding validateSearch configuration to the admin route in App.tsx. The changes directly address the TanStack Router configuration issue that was causing the 'search does not match any page' error.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: log in as an admin user, navigate to /admin via the header link, verify the page loads without routing errors, and confirm all admin dashboard sections (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible.
missing_requirements.reason: No test files or test code evidence found in the diff. The requirement explicitly calls for end-to-end testing of the admin panel access flow, but only implementation code changes are present.
